sessions.title: Sentinel Phase 1 — Multi-repo deployment
work_packages: WP-0: Repo migration to huanlongAI org (16 repos)
WP-1.5: tzhOS caller template (119-line inline → 25-line reusable)
WP-2: D-4~D-6 precheck scripts (directory, capability-source, brand-token)
WP-3: LLM review layer — real Claude API integration
WP-4: Batch deployment to all 16 huanlongAI repos
sessions.summary: Deployed Consistency Sentinel CI/CD across entire huanlongAI org. Hub-and-spoke architecture: sentinel-shared (public) hosts reusable workflow + scripts; each repo has ~25-line caller + .sentinel/config.yaml. Four config profiles: governance, infra, app, library. Six deterministic prechecks (D-1~D-6) + LLM review layer with graceful degradation.
key_decisions: permissions must be in caller, never in reusable workflow (startup_failure)
sentinel-shared must be public (GITHUB_TOKEN scope limitation)
LLM failures produce ESCALATE verdict, not FAIL (non-blocking)
Repo name cannot start with dot (GitHub uses: directive parse failure)

sessions.title: Custom Skills — sentinel-ops & governance-workflow
work_packages: sentinel-ops skill: Sentinel CI/CD operational knowledge base (313 lines, ~2900 tokens)
governance-workflow skill: Governance automation workflows (231 lines, ~2050 tokens)
sessions.summary: Created and packaged two domain-specific Cowork skills encoding all operational knowledge from Sentinel Phase 1.

sessions.title: WP-6: Governance doc alignment
work_packages: WP-6.1: CONSEN-SPEC-001 v1.0→v1.1 (8 targeted updates)
WP-6.2: REPO-MAP-001 v1.0 (new, 16-repo directory)
WP-6.3: CLAUDE.md Sentinel section across all repos + sentinel-shared CLAUDE.md
sessions.summary: Aligned all governance documents with Phase 1 deployment reality.

sessions.title: WP-5: Crystallization automation + D-2 fix
work_packages: WP-5.1: crystallization.yml workflow_dispatch (6 inputs, LLM + template fallback)
WP-5.2: crystallize-ruling.sh (Claude API draft, RULINGS.md append, CHANGELOG.md update)
WP-5.3: End-to-end validation (4 iterations to resolve permission issues)
D-2 fix: terminology_exclude_patterns for governance spec files
sessions.summary: Implemented CONSEN-SPEC §5.2 crystallization automation. Fixed D-2 false positive.
key_decisions: MCP push_files cannot write .github/workflows/ (403) — use git push via osascript
Label attachment made best-effort to prevent PR creation failure
Org + repo workflow permissions must both enable Actions PR creation

sessions.title: WP-8: Cross-repo cascade verification (Phase 2)
work_packages: WP-8.1: cascade-verify.yml design (fan-out + collect-results two-job architecture)
WP-8.2: Deploy cascade-verify.yml to sentinel-shared (7cd5266)
WP-8.3: Batch update 16 downstream callers with repository_dispatch trigger
WP-8.4: End-to-end test — 16/16 dispatch success, collect-results passed
sessions.summary: Implemented cross-repo cascade verification for the Sentinel hub-and-spoke system.

architecture.collect: 120s wait, then query /actions/runs?event=repository_dispatch for each repo
architecture.alerting: Auto-create issue with cascade-failure label if any repo fails

key_decisions: CASCADE_TOKEN (PAT with repo scope) required for cross-repo dispatch
repository_dispatch event type 'sentinel-cascade' added to all downstream callers
120s wait is sufficient for most sentinel runs (avg ~15s per run)
Base64 transfer pattern used for osascript to avoid heredoc/triple-quote escaping issues
next_steps: WP-7: Sentinel matrix auto-update on ruling
Replace CASCADE_TOKEN OAuth with fine-grained PAT

sessions.title: WP-7 + WP-9: Matrix auto-update & Sentinel dashboard (Phase 2)
work_packages: WP-7.1: ruling-matrix-update.yml v2 deployed (workflow_dispatch)
WP-7.2: ruling-merge-hook.yml v2 deployed to tzhOS
WP-7.3: matrix-updater.yml deployed (pure ASCII, new filename) - workflow_dispatch VERIFIED
WP-9.1: dashboard.yml deployed (pure ASCII, new filename) - workflow_dispatch VERIFIED
WP-9.2: Dashboard e2e run SUCCESS
WP-9.3: Matrix-updater e2e pipeline correct, CASCADE_TOKEN fix applied
sessions.summary: Deployed matrix auto-update pipeline and Sentinel dashboard. CRITICAL DISCOVERY: Unicode chars in YAML prevent GitHub trigger indexer from registering workflow_dispatch.

architecture.matrix_update_flow: ruling PR merge → ruling-merge-hook extracts matrix_change → workflow_dispatch to sentinel-shared → LLM drafts matrix update → creates PR
architecture.dashboard_flow: daily cron 08:00 UTC → query 16 repos for sentinel run status → STEP_SUMMARY + auto-issue on failure

key_decisions: Unicode chars prevent GitHub trigger indexer registration
Workflow ID cached per filename - need fresh filenames after delete
Pure ASCII + new filenames = immediate registration
CASCADE_TOKEN for PR/issue creation on public repos

sessions.title: Phase 3: E2E pipeline verification + skill knowledge sync
work_packages: P1b: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY configured on sentinel-shared
P1a: Fine-grained PAT specification prepared for CASCADE_TOKEN migration
P2: sentinel-ops skill updated with Phase 2 knowledge (314->396 lines)
P2b: governance-workflow skill updated with Phase 2 knowledge (231->309 lines)
E2E: Full matrix-updater pipeline verified with LLM draft (PR #2 auto-created)
sessions.summary: Configured ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on sentinel-shared and ran full E2E test of matrix auto-update pipeline. Claude API correctly drafted GPC-099 addition to sentinel-matrix.yaml and auto-created PR #2. Both Cowork skills updated with Phase 2 operational knowledge.
artifacts: sentinel-ops SKILL.md (396 lines, Phase 2 knowledge added)
governance-workflow SKILL.md (309 lines, Phase 2 knowledge added)
key_decisions: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY as repo-level secret on sentinel-shared (not org-level yet)
Fine-grained PAT spec: 17 repos, Actions RW + Contents R + Issues RW + PRs RW
next_steps: Create and deploy fine-grained PAT as CASCADE_TOKEN
Live ruling merge E2E (real ruling PR on tzhOS)

sessions.title: Security hardening: Fine-grained PAT deployment + E2E token verification
work_packages: Fine-grained PAT (CASCADE_TOKEN) deployed to sentinel-shared and tzhOS
Org-level ANTHROPIC_API_KEY configured (all-repo access)
E2E token verification: dashboard.yml SUCCESS (run #23710669945)
E2E token verification: matrix-updater.yml SUCCESS (run #23710671629, PR #4 auto-created)
Cleanup: closed test PRs (#2, #4), deleted test branches, repo left clean
sessions.summary: Migrated from classic PAT to fine-grained PAT with minimal permissions (Actions RW, Contents R, Issues RW, PRs RW). Deployed new CASCADE_TOKEN to both hub repos. Migrated ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to org-level secret for automatic propagation to all 16 downstream repos. Full E2E verification confirmed both tokens work correctly across the entire pipeline. Cleaned up all test artifacts.
artifacts: CASCADE_TOKEN: fine-grained PAT on sentinel-shared + tzhOS (updated 2026-03-29T13:55Z)
key_decisions: Fine-grained PAT scoped to 17 repos only (not org-wide)
Org-level ANTHROPIC_API_KEY with all-repo visibility (needed by downstream sentinel callers)
Classic PAT can now be safely revoked
CASCADE_TOKEN only on hub repos (sentinel-shared, tzhOS), not downstream
next_steps: Revoke classic PAT (user action in GitHub UI)
Live ruling merge E2E with real governance ruling on tzhOS
Phase 4 planning: monitoring, alerting escalation, auto-remediation

phase_status: Phase 1-3 COMPLETE + Security Hardened: Fine-grained PAT deployed, org secrets configured, full E2E verified
